info.name: LMS — FAQ API
info.description:
FAQ (Frequently Asked Questions) public endpoints.

Base URL: `{{base_url}}` (e.g. https://www.alertiqa.edu.sa/api/v1)

All FAQ endpoints are **public** — no authentication required.

request.description:
Returns all active FAQs ordered by `sort_order` then `id`.

Response includes:
- `data` — flat array of all FAQs
- `grouped` — FAQs keyed by category
- `total` — total count

**No authentication required.**

response.name: 200 — Success

query.description: Filter by category. Allowed values: registration | courses | certificates | platform | support

request.description:
Returns active FAQs filtered by a specific category.

**Allowed category values:**
| Value | Label |
|---|---|
| `registration` | التسجيل والدفع |
| `courses` | الدورات والدبلومات |
| `certificates` | الشهادات والاعتماد |
| `platform` | منصة الطالب |
| `support` | الدعم التقني |

**No authentication required.**

response.name: 200 — Filtered by registration
